title: Sci-Fantasy MC
description: Collection of MCreator mods that are themed in Sci-Fi and Fantasy genres with many ways to be powerful.
body:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sqJW2Xu8Mk)

# Sci-Fantasy MC

A small collection of MCreator mods that are themed in Sci-Fi and Fantasy Genres with many ways to grind to be powerful. The Modpack also improves a lot of aspects of combat and PvP. The modpack also includes some QOL non-MCreator mods like JEI and Mouse Tweaks.
## 
### The modpack adds these MCreator mods:
- [Combat Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/combatreborn)
- [Improvised](https://modrinth.com/mod/improvised)
- [Mystical Power Crystals [MPC]](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-power-crystals)
- [The Lunar Undead [TLU]](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-lunar-undead)
- [Zoe Isn't Cyberpunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoe-isnt-cyberpunk)
- [Yank It Out](https://modrinth.com/mod/yank-it-out)
- [Blood and Deepslate](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-and-deepslate)
- [Quality Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/quality-equipment)
- [Glowroot](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowroot)
- [Fair Trade](https://modrinth.com/mod/fair-trade)
## 
### Information:
- Version: Forge 1.20.1
- Difficulty: Hard
- Grinding: A lot
- Theme: Magic/Fantasy and Technology
- Recommendation: Play this modpack with friends
##
Have Fun! :3
